subtitles: Let's reach your calorie goal today.
Track your food, crush your goals.
Every meal counts. Let's log it!
Stay on top of your nutrition today.
Small steps lead to big results!
noMealsLogged: No meals logged today. Use the Camera tab to add some!
calorieGoalMessage: Your goal is {{goal}} kcal today — you've got this! 💪
milestonesSub: Complete daily healthy activities to unlock your milestone badges! 🔓
danceRhythmTooltip: Log 15+ minutes of Afrobeats Dance to unlock
mindfulScannerCompleted: Completed! Logged first meal of the day
mindfulScannerTooltip: Log any meal using Gemini Camera to unlock
caloriePerfectCompleted: Completed! Stayed within your {{goal}} kcal limit
caloriePerfectTooltip: Log food within your {{goal}} kcal goal to unlock
stepsGoalProgressText: Aim for {{goal}} steps today to keep your heart pumping! 💙
stepCheckGuide: Check steps in your phone Health app, then report here.
stepCheckQuestion: Did you hit your step goal today?
stepGoalSuccess: Awesome! You crushed your step goal today! Keep it up! 🎉
stepGoalEncouragement: No worries! We'll crush it tomorrow. Every day is a fresh start! 💪
noMealsLoggedText: Meals you log today will show up here. Snap a photo with the Camera tab or add one manually to get started!
mealActionAlert: Real meals can only be edited or deleted within 10 minutes of logging to maintain tracking integrity.
activityPageSub: Track steps, workout minutes, and burn active energy today.
syncIntro: Select an activity category and log your metrics to automatically calculate calorie expenditure.
noActivitiesDesc: Use the sync form above to record your step count or workout minutes for the day.

onboarding.joinMeCal: Join MeCal to start your wellness journey.
onboarding.invalidLoseTarget: Target weight must be less than current weight
onboarding.invalidGainTarget: Target weight must be greater than current weight
onboarding.bothWater: Tick here if you will like to select both
onboarding.waterExpl: This helps us gauge and determine how much water you drink. You can make any changes to your decisions later in the app.
onboarding.allergyExpl: This will be considered while recommending food and snacks for you in the app.
onboarding.step3Sub: Enter your details to help us calculate your needs.
onboarding.step4Sub: What are you trying to achieve?
onboarding.step5Sub: This helps us tailor meal suggestions.
onboarding.step6Sub: How do you spend your day?
onboarding.step7Sub: Help us calculate your daily needs.
onboarding.step8Title: Do you have any food allergies?
onboarding.step8Sub: We'll recommend only safe options and add your allergies to order notes.
onboarding.step9Sub: MeCal AI built this from your profile.

scan.barcodeHint: Find the barcode on packaged food and enter the numbers.
scan.barcodeNotFound: Product not found. Try manual entry.
